title: Line 25000 – Other payments deduction - Canada.ca
content:
## Line 25000 – Other payments deduction
Generally, you can deduct the amount from line 14700 of your return on line 25000 . This amount at line 14700 is the total of:
- Line 14400 – Workers' compensation benefits
- Line 14500 – Social assistance payments
- Line 14600 – Net federal supplements paid

## Completing your tax return
Enter the amount from line 14700 of your return on line 25000 if you did not enter an amount on line 14600 .
If you reported net federal supplements on line 14600 of your return, you may not be entitled to claim the whole amount from line 14700 of your return. If so, complete the chart for line 25000 using your Federal Worksheet .
If the result of your calculation is more than $93,454 , use the chart below to find out how much you can deduct. Otherwise, enter the amount from line 14700 of your return on line 25000 of your return.

## Special calculation if an amount is reported on line 14600 and line 23500
Use the chart below to help you calculate the amount to enter on line 25000 .
Net federal supplements paid (line 14600)
Net federal supplements paid (line 14600)
Social benefits repayment (line 23500)
Social benefits repayment (line 23500)
Old age security (OAS) pension (line 11300)
Old age security (OAS) pension (line 11300)
EI benefits repayment (line 7  of the chart for line 23500 of your Federal Worksheet)
EI benefits repayment (line 7  of the chart for line 23500 of your Federal Worksheet)
Line 2 minus line 5 (if negative, enter 0)
Line 2 minus line 5 (if negative, enter 0)
Line 1 minus line 6 (if negative, enter 0)
Line 1 minus line 6 (if negative, enter 0)
Workers' compensation benefits (line 14400)
Workers' compensation benefits (line 14400)
Social assistance payments (line 14500)
Social assistance payments (line 14500)
Other payments deduction: Add lines 7 to 9. Enter this amount on line 25000 of your return.
Other payments deduction: Add lines 7 to 9. Enter this amount on line 25000 of your return.

## Forms and publications
- Taxes when you retire or turn 65 years old
- Line 14400 – Workers' compensation benefits
- Line 14500 – Social assistance payments
- Line 14600 – Net federal supplements paid
